Cattle Track north carpark to Blue River
Lake Gault Track
trails.description: A gradual climb on a historical tramping track through ancient podocarp forest provides panoramic views of Aoraki /Mount Cook. On a good day, you can see the mountain landscape reflected in Lake Gault.

trails.name: Copland Track to Welcome Flat Hut
trails.description: This popular tramp gives a glimpse of Westland’s spectacular forest, river and mountain scenery, with natural hot pools at Welcome Flat an added attraction.

trails.name: Gillespies Beach walking tracks
trails.description: A visit to Gillespies Beach offers a scenic drive, lovely views of the Southern Alps Kā Tiritiri o te Moana, an historic cemetery and coastal walks.

trails.name: Lake Matheson / Te Ara Kairaumati Walk
trails.description: A gentle walk leads to views of the mountains reflected on the still waters of Lake Matheson. It's one of our best short walks.

trails.name: Moeraki Valley Track
trails.description: The Moeraki Valley offers good tramping for the fit and experienced. The U-shaped valley is typical of those carved out by glaciers during repeated glacial periods.

trails.name: Mount Fox Route
trails.description: Mount Fox Route is just 3 km south of the town of Fox Glacier. The challenging climb to the top is only suitable for experienced and properly equipped trampers.

trails.name: Mica Mine Tops Route
trails.description: The Mica Mine Tops Route is a challenging route within the rugged backcountry environment of South Westland.

trails.name: Māori Saddle Route
trails.description: The Māori Saddle Route takes you from the Historic Haast to Paringa Track to Mataketake Hut.

trails.name: L. Matheson Walk   C'Park To Jetty Viewp
